## Summary

## Verification

List the exact commands run and their outcomes.

```text
command
result
```

## Honesty checklist

- [ ] Tests fail for the targeted defect without the mechanism change and pass with it.
- [ ] Unknown or inconclusive states remain explicit; no evidence is manufactured.
- [ ] Documentation and public claims match the implemented scope.
- [ ] No credentials, private research data, generated caches, or local infrastructure paths are included.
- [ ] AI-assisted code or prose is disclosed below, including how it was checked.

## AI assistance

State where AI tools were used and how their output was reviewed or verified. Write `None` if no AI tools were used.
